calendar.matters:
MOTION And Notice Of Motion Of Petitioner Infinity Insurance Company To Obtain Cellular Phone Records From T-Mobile Or Alternatively, To Enforce Deposition Subpoena; Declaration Of Jonathan H. Colman In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jan-21-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. SARA KIM, Esq. of Colman Perkins Law Group (tel: 818-546-8686) for Petitioner.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PETITIONER INFINITY INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion To Obtain Cellular Phone Records From T-Mobile Or Alternatively, To Enforce Deposition Subpoena.

Matter discussed as to service of the motion. Counsel Sara Kim states the proof of service is currently pending in the e-filing queue since January 2, 2025. The clerk prints out the proof of service from the electronic queue. Upon conclusion, the Court vacates its tentative ruling and grants the motion thereof.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/HEK)
